subject: a single grunt of pain from a gladiator taking a blow — short, breathy, no words
prompt: Close-mic'd guttural grunt of a desert gladiator taking a heavy blow: strained breath, throat rasp, wet exhale, tight chest snap. Starts immediate, peaks at 0.2s with raw pain, decays into dusty, ragged breath by 0.6s — visceral, grounded, weighty.
